rationale: The citing article is an editorial/content-coding assessment of 401 JMR papers (2013–2019) using consensus coding and HHI, not a paper that applies or builds dynamic heterogeneity modeling. The cited item is a specific quantitative-method paper, and the only linkage provided is a single DOI match with no in-text context. Given this evidence, the citation most likely reflects inclusion/illustration within the reviewed JMR corpus rather than substantive use.
